    "Exceeded allowable sidewall pressure during wire pull",
    "High risk of jamming and insulation damage inside the conduit run"

    "Stop the wire pulling operation immediately",

  "rationale": "Exceeding the maximum allowable sidewall pressure or encountering a jamming condition during an active wire pull can permanently damage conductor insulation, leading to future ground faults or short circuits.
